mapper.select: SELECT b_num, b_name, b_title, b_content, b_pwd, b_readCnt, b_date FROM spring_board ORDER BY b_num DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spring_board(b_name, b_title, b_content, b_pwd, b_readCnt) VALUES (#{boardName}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardPasswd}, #{boardReadCnt})
mapper.update: UPDATE spring_board SET b_readCnt = b_readCnt + 1 WHERE b_num = #{boardNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT b_num, b_name, b_title, b_content, TO_CHAR(b_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS b_date, b_readCnt FROM spring_board WHERE b_num = #{boardNumber}
SELECT b_num, b_title, b_name, TO_CHAR(b_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS b_date, b_readcnt FROM spring_board ORDER BY b_num DESC
